postgres.command: cmd /c echo PostgreSQL starting... && timeout /t 1 /nobreak >nul && echo PostgreSQL ready

redis.command: cmd /c echo Redis starting... && timeout /t 1 /nobreak >nul && echo Redis ready

auth_service.command: cmd /c echo Auth service starting... && timeout /t 1 /nobreak >nul && echo Auth service ready

api_gateway.command: cmd /c echo API Gateway starting... && timeout /t 1 /nobreak >nul && echo API Gateway ready

user_service.command: cmd /c echo User service starting... && timeout /t 1 /nobreak >nul && echo User service ready

frontend.command: cmd /c echo Frontend starting... && timeout /t 1 /nobreak >nul && echo Frontend ready
